testcase.name: test_01_load_pet_soul_returns_medical_conditions_arthritis

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'arthritis' in health_conditions, got: assert 'arthritis' in '' + where '' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff40af881188>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff40af881188> = ''.lower

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_soul_learning_engine_iteration_213.py:71: in test_01_load_pet_soul_returns_medical_conditions_arthritis assert "arthritis" in health_conditions.lower(), \ E AssertionError: Expected 'arthritis' in health_conditions, got: E assert 'arthritis' in '' E + where '' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff40af881188>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff40af881188> = ''.lower
